Metadata.title: Goalkeeper Academy
Metadata.description: Goalkeeper academy in the Chablais Valais region. Specialized training for young goalkeepers aged 6 to 18.

Footer.tagline: The goalkeeper academy of the Chablais Valais region. Specialized training for young goalkeepers aged 6 to 18.

HomePage.metaDescription: Specialized training for goalkeepers aged 6 to 18. Weekly sessions, holiday camps, private coaching and club partnerships in the Chablais Valais region.

hero.title: Training tomorrow's goalkeepers
hero.subtitle: Weekly sessions, holiday camps and private coaching for goalkeepers aged 6 to 18 in the Chablais Valais region.
hero.imageAlt: Young goalkeeper diving during a training session

values.title: An approach built for the toughest position on the pitch

specialized.title: 100% goalkeepers
specialized.description: Every coach is a former keeper. No mixed sessions with outfield players — every drill targets a specific goalkeeping skill.

progression.title: Measured progress
progression.description: Quarterly technical reviews, video analysis and personal goals. You can see the progress, and so can your child.

passion.title: Fun first
passion.description: Small groups, family atmosphere, playful drills. Our goalkeepers come back because they enjoy the work.

offers.title: Find the format that fits you
offers.subtitle: Whether you're looking for weekly coaching, an intensive camp or a one-off boost, we have a format for you.

annual.title: Annual
annual.description: One weekly session from September to June, individual follow-up, gear included.

monthly.title: Monthly
monthly.description: Short-term, perfect to discover the academy or top up a club program.

camps.title: Camps
camps.description: Intensive 3- to 5-day camps during school holidays. Half-day or full-day formats.

parent.quote: Within six months our son's distribution game changed completely. The team is demanding but caring — exactly what we were looking for.
parent.author: Sandrine M.

keeper.quote: I'm learning things I'd never seen at my club. And we have a lot of fun in training too.
keeper.author: Léo, age 14

club.quote: Goalkeeper Academy handles the specific training of our keepers, which frees up valuable time for our team work.
club.author: Marc D.

partners.title: They trust us
partners.subtitle: Partner clubs across the Chablais and the leading goalkeeper event in French-speaking Switzerland.

blogPreview.title: Tips, analysis and behind the scenes

post1.title: 5 drills to improve footwork on aerial claims
post1.excerpt: Timing and balance are built on the ground before they're built in the air. Here is our favorite routine.

post2.title: Conceding a goal: the 30-second reset routine
post2.excerpt: How our coaches train goalkeepers to move on instantly after a mistake.

post3.title: Easter camp 2026 wrap-up
post3.excerpt: Three days of intensity, two venues, 24 goalkeepers. The recap in pictures and key numbers.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to step between the posts?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Book a free trial session or get in touch to talk about your goalkeeper's journey.

CampsPage.metaDescription: Goalkeeper camps during school holidays: Easter, summer, autumn. All Goalkeeper Academy camps at a glance.

hero.title: Intensive holidays, lasting progress
hero.subtitle: 3 to 5 days to make a real jump between two seasons. Small groups, by age, lunch included.

partner.title: Giana Stop & Shoot
partner.description: The reference goalkeeper tournament in French-speaking Switzerland. Goalkeeper Academy has been an official partner for three editions.

included.title: Included in the price
included.body: UEFA-certified coaching staff, lunch, snacks, Goalkeeper Academy t-shirt and bottle, individual technical report.

Reservation.title: Camp registration
Reservation.subtitle: A few steps to finalise your goalkeeper's registration.

step1.title: Who's signing up?
step1.subtitle: Pick the goalkeeper to register and confirm your email address.
step1.notLoggedIn: Tip: create a parent account to find your goalkeepers and invoices in your member area.

step2.title: Review
step2.subtitle: Double-check the details before proceeding to payment.
step2.terms: By continuing you agree to Goalkeeper Academy's terms of sale and privacy policy.

card.demoNote: Demo mode: no real payment will be processed. The fields are pre-filled with a test card.

twint.title: Scan with TWINT
twint.body: Open the TWINT app on your phone and scan the code to complete the payment.

qr.title: Receive a QR-bill
qr.body: You'll receive a Swiss QR-bill by email. Payment is due within 30 days.

confirmation.title: Thanks, you're all set!
confirmation.subtitle: {name}'s registration is recorded. You'll receive a recap by email in a few minutes.
confirmation.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent to {email}.
confirmation.demoNote: Demo — no real payment was processed and no data was sent to a payment provider.

GianaPage.metaDescription: Goalkeeper Academy is an official partner of Giana Stop & Shoot, the French-speaking Swiss tournament fully dedicated to goalkeepers.

hero.title: Giana Stop & Shoot
hero.subtitle: The French-speaking Swiss event fully dedicated to goalkeepers. One day, one tournament, one shared passion.

about.title: A unique format for goalkeepers
about.intro: Each year, Giana Stop & Shoot gathers around a hundred goalkeepers from all over French-speaking Switzerland for technical contests and a knockout mini-tournament. No outfield players: just goalkeepers, their gloves and an audience of connoisseurs.

partnership.title: Why Goalkeeper Academy is a partner

values.title: Shared values
values.description: Putting the goalkeeper at the center, celebrating the position and creating moments of exchange between enthusiasts.

coaching.title: Coaches on site
coaching.description: Our coaches run the technical workshops and support young goalkeepers throughout the day.

spotting.title: Talent spotting
spotting.description: The event also serves as a showcase to spot talents and offer them follow-up at the academy.

cta.title: Want to be there?
cta.subtitle: Join us at the Monthey stadium or register your goalkeeper via the official website.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of registrations, payments and ongoing camps.

welcome.title: Welcome to the admin area
welcome.body: Use the side menu to browse parents, goalkeepers, invoices and camps. Sensitive actions (mark invoice as paid, etc.) are restricted to the admin role via Supabase RLS policies.

Legal.placeholderNotice: Template wording — must be reviewed by your legal advisor before publishing. Factual elements (legal name, address, host) need to be filled in.

imprint.metaDescription: Legal notice and editorial information for the Goalkeeper Academy website.
imprint.title: Legal notice
imprint.intro: This legal notice applies to goalkeeperacademy.ch and identifies the publisher, the host and the general terms of use.

sections.heading: Publisher
sections.body: Goalkeeper Academy — legal name to be confirmed. Headquarters: Chablais Valais, Switzerland. Email: contact@goalkeeperacademy.ch. Swiss UID: to be confirmed.

sections.heading: Director of publication
sections.body: The director of publication is the legal representative of Goalkeeper Academy.

sections.heading: Hosting
sections.body: The website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA — vercel.com.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: All content on this website (texts, images, logos, code) is protected by copyright. Any reproduction without prior written authorization is forbidden.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: Goalkeeper Academy strives to ensure the accuracy of published information but cannot be held liable for errors, omissions or temporary unavailability of the website.

terms.metaDescription: General terms of sale applicable to Goalkeeper Academy services.
terms.title: Terms of sale
terms.intro: These terms apply to any service ordered from Goalkeeper Academy: annual and monthly programs, private lessons, camps and club contracts.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.body: These terms govern the provision of goalkeeper training services. Any enrollment implies full and unconditional acceptance of these terms.

sections.heading: Enrollment and payment
sections.body: Enrollment is done via the website or by email. Payment is made by card, TWINT or Swiss QR-bill. Current prices are published on the Offers page.

sections.heading: Cancellation and refund
sections.body: Any cancellation must be notified in writing. Refund conditions vary depending on the program (annual, monthly, camp) and are detailed at enrollment.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: Goalkeeper Academy carries professional liability insurance. The academy cannot be held liable in cases of force majeure or non-compliance with instructions by participants.

sections.heading: Governing law
sections.body: These terms are governed by Swiss law. Any dispute shall fall under the jurisdiction of the courts of the Canton of Valais.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy compliant with the Swiss FADP and the European GDPR.
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Goalkeeper Academy takes the protection of your personal data very seriously, in line with the new Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP) and the European General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.heading: Data collected
sections.body: We collect strictly necessary data: first and last name, email, phone, information about the goalkeeper (age, club). No sensitive data is requested without justification.

sections.heading: Purposes
sections.body: Data is used to manage enrollments, communicate with families, issue invoices and improve our services. It is never sold.

sections.heading: Retention
sections.body: Data is kept for as long as necessary for the service and to meet legal obligations (10 years for accounting). It is then deleted.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, rectify, delete and port your data. To exercise these rights, write to contact@goalkeeperacademy.ch.

sections.heading: Security
sections.body: Data is stored on European servers (Supabase, Frankfurt hosting) and protected by encryption in transit and at rest.

cookies.metaDescription: Cookie usage policy for the Goalkeeper Academy website.
cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.intro: This page describes how Goalkeeper Academy uses cookies and similar technologies on its website.

sections.heading: What is a cookie?
sections.body: A cookie is a small text file stored on your device when visiting a website. It allows the site to recognize you on subsequent visits.

sections.heading: Cookies we use
sections.body: Our website only uses strictly necessary cookies (language, session). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are placed without your consent.

sections.heading: Analytics
sections.body: We plan to use a privacy-friendly analytics solution (Plausible or equivalent) without persistent cookies or data sharing with third parties.

sections.heading: Managing cookies
sections.body: You can configure your browser to block cookies. This may affect some features of the website.

OffersPage.metaDescription: Discover our goalkeeper programs: annual, monthly, private lessons, holiday camps and club contracts. Pricing and FAQ.

hero.title: A program for every journey
hero.subtitle: Pick the format that matches your rhythm and goals. All prices in CHF, VAT included.

annual.title: Annual
annual.description: One weekly session from September to June, individual follow-up and gear included.

monthly.title: Monthly
monthly.description: Discover the academy or top up a club season, month by month.
bullets: Same coaches as the annual program
Ideal to test before going annual

private.title: Private lessons
private.description: One coach for one (or two) goalkeeper. Goal set together, video review and action plan.
bullets: Personal plan sent after the session

camps.title: Camps
camps.description: Intensive camps during school breaks. Half-day or full-day, by age group.

club.title: Club contract
club.description: We come to your club to train every goalkeeper across all teams.
bullets: Monthly reporting to your technical director
Sliding pricing based on number of keepers

trial.question: Is there a free trial session?
trial.answer: Yes. The very first session is free, with no commitment. Just get in touch to book a slot suited to your goalkeeper's age.

siblings.question: Is there a sibling discount?
siblings.answer: Yes, we apply −10% from the second child enrolled in the annual or monthly program.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: Card and TWINT online via our platform, or Swiss QR-bill for bank transfers.

cancel.question: How do I cancel the monthly program?
cancel.answer: A short email before the 25th of the month is enough, free of charge. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current month.

club.question: How does a club contract work?
club.answer: We first discuss your needs (number of goalkeepers, frequency, location), then send a tailored quote. The service can start the following month.

AcademyPage.metaDescription: Discover Goalkeeper Academy: our mission, our coaching team, our pedagogical method and our facilities in the Chablais Valais region.

hero.title: Goalkeeper specialists, from the ground up
hero.subtitle: An independent academy, built by goalkeepers for goalkeepers, in the heart of the Chablais Valais region.
hero.imageAlt: View of the Dents du Midi from the Chablais

mission.title: Give every goalkeeper the tools to express themselves
mission.intro: Goalkeeper Academy was born from a simple observation: in most clubs, goalkeepers receive little to no specific training. We fill that gap with a structured curriculum, specialized coaches and long-term follow-up.

team.title: Coaches who have stood in goal themselves
team.subtitle: All our coaches played the position at a competitive level and hold a national coaching certificate.

head.name: Antoine R.
head.bio: Former semi-pro goalkeeper, holds the Goalkeeper C+ diploma. 12 years of youth development experience.

youth.name: Maxime L.
youth.bio: Specialist in motor skills development and play-based learning for the youngest goalkeepers.

perf.name: Julien V.
perf.bio: Physical and mental preparation for goalkeepers in the performance pathway.

technical.title: Individual technique
technical.description: Stance, handling, diving, distribution. The fundamentals drilled and corrected in every session.

tactical.title: Reading the game
tactical.description: Positioning, communication with the defense, anticipation. The modern keeper plays with their feet and their head.

physical.title: Physical preparation
physical.description: Coordination, jumping, core strength, reaction speed. Tailored to each age group.

mental.title: Mindset & confidence
mental.description: Focus routines, error recovery, leadership. The most unforgiving position is also a mental one.

facilities.title: Pitches built for goalkeepers
facilities.subtitle: We train at several venues across the Chablais depending on the season and the age group.

outdoor.title: Outdoor pitches
outdoor.description: Approved natural and synthetic grass, in Monthey and Vouvry.

indoor.title: Indoor halls
indoor.description: Sports flooring in winter so we keep intensity high whatever the weather.

gear.title: Pro equipment
gear.description: Mobile goals, dummies, resistance bands, video. All specific gear is provided.

excellence.title: Caring excellence
excellence.description: We push high, we never humiliate. Every goalkeeper progresses at their own pace.

respect.title: Respect & fair play
respect.description: Of the opposing keeper, of the referee, of teammates. Sporting values come first.

passion.title: Love of the position
passion.description: Loving the goalkeeping role is the foundation. We feed that fire in every session.
